name: Week 1 Day 2 Morning Flow
description: Morning flow after Push day. Core-heavy floor work, bodyweight legs, hip mobility, and light pushup variations for blood flow. No equipment needed — just a mat. Helps you recover faster while still getting work in.

exercises.notes: Slow — exhale on cat, inhale on cow. Wake up the spine.
30s each side. Push hips forward gently. Your hip flexors are tight from sitting.
30s each side. Rock gently into it. Opens up glutes and hips.
Touch toes, grab ankles, drop into deep squat, stand. Repeat.
Pedal out the feet, push hips high. Stretches hamstrings and shoulders.
Opposite arm/leg. Keep lower back glued to floor. Slow and controlled.
Slow — touch elbow to opposite knee, fully extend the other leg.
Extend opposite arm/leg, hold 2 seconds, squeeze glute. Core stability.
Squeeze everything — glutes, core, quads. Don't sag.
Full depth, arms in front. Slow on the way down — 2 second descent.
Deep lateral squat, heel stays planted. Opens up adductors and hips.
Squeeze hard at top, 2 second hold. Feel the glutes, not the lower back.
Slow walking or reverse lunges. Control the descent, drive through front heel.
Action Jacquelyn. Wide stance, toes out, drop into a plié and pulse. Inner thighs and quads.
Kneel upright, body straight, lean backwards as far as you can control. Quads fight the lean. Come back up. Go only as far as you can return from.
Easy reps — not to failure. Just getting blood into chest/tris/shoulders to help recovery.
Wider grip, feel the chest stretch at the bottom. Easy pace.
Slow and controlled — bring knee to chest, hold 1 second. Core + hip flexors.
30s each side. Deeper than the warmup — you're warm now.
Deep squat hold — just hang out. Scroll your phone. Opens everything up.
Slow, end on cow (extension). Finish with a good spine position.

tips: This is RECOVERY — nothing should feel hard. If it does, do fewer reps.
Core and legs are the focus since your upper body is wrecked from Push day
The pushup block is just for blood flow — do NOT go to failure
Cossack squats are gold for hip mobility AND leg strength
Asian squat hold at the end: just sit in it, let gravity do the work
Total: ~30 min on a mat. No equipment needed.
